title: Welcome and Journey Setup
subtitle: Prepare your Umrah learning journey
explanation: Choose your language, review the journey, and prepare your heart for learning the steps of Umrah.
audioScript: Welcome. This guide will help you understand the main steps of Umrah. Move slowly, learn carefully, and ask Allah for acceptance.

title: Prepare for Ihram
subtitle: Enter a state of purity and humility
explanation: Before crossing the Miqat, prepare for Ihram. Men wear two unstitched cloths. Women wear modest Islamic clothing. Avoid restricted acts after entering Ihram.
audioScript: Now prepare for Ihram. This is not only clothing; it is a state of worship, humility, and obedience.

title: Make Niyyah
subtitle: Make the intention for Umrah
explanation: At the Miqat or before crossing it, make the intention in your heart for Umrah and say: Labbayka Allahumma Umrah.
audioScript: Make your intention sincerely for Allah. Say: Labbayka Allahumma Umrah.

title: Recite Talbiyah
subtitle: Declare your response to Allah's call
explanation: After making intention, recite the Talbiyah frequently until reaching Masjid al-Haram.
audioScript: Recite: Labbayka Allahumma Labbayk. Labbayka la sharika laka labbayk. Innal hamda wan ni'mata laka wal mulk. La sharika lak.

title: Enter Masjid al-Haram
subtitle: Arrive at the House of Allah
explanation: Enter respectfully, with calmness and gratitude. When you see the Kaaba, make personal dua.
audioScript: You have reached Masjid al-Haram. Enter with respect and gratitude. Make dua from your heart.

title: Start Tawaf
subtitle: Begin walking around the Kaaba
explanation: Start near the Black Stone area. Walk anti-clockwise, keeping the Kaaba on your left.
audioScript: Begin Tawaf from the Black Stone area. Walk gently and keep the Kaaba on your left.

title: Complete 7 Rounds of Tawaf
subtitle: Complete all seven circuits
explanation: Continue until you complete seven full rounds around the Kaaba. Make dua and dhikr while walking.
audioScript: Continue Tawaf until you complete seven rounds. Be patient, avoid pushing, and remember Allah.

title: Pray 2 Rak'ahs
subtitle: Pray after Tawaf
explanation: After Tawaf, pray two Rak'ahs if possible behind Maqam Ibrahim. If crowded, pray anywhere suitable in Masjid al-Haram.
audioScript: After completing Tawaf, pray two Rak'ahs if possible. If crowded, choose a safe place.

title: Drink Zamzam
subtitle: Drink blessed water and make dua
explanation: Drink Zamzam water and make sincere dua for yourself, your family, and the Ummah.
audioScript: Drink Zamzam with gratitude. Ask Allah for goodness, healing, guidance, and acceptance.

title: Sa'i Between Safa and Marwa
subtitle: Walk seven passages
explanation: Start at Safa and walk to Marwa. Continue until seven passages are complete, ending at Marwa.
audioScript: Begin Sa'i at Safa. Walk between Safa and Marwa seven times, ending at Marwa.

title: Trim or Shave Hair
subtitle: Complete the required acts of Umrah
explanation: After Sa'i, men shave or trim their hair. Women cut a small portion from the ends of the hair. This completes Umrah.
audioScript: Now trim or shave the hair according to the guidance. With this, the required acts of Umrah are complete.

title: Umrah Complete
subtitle: Exit Ihram and thank Allah
explanation: Alhamdulillah, your Umrah is complete. Thank Allah and ask Him to accept it from you.
audioScript: Alhamdulillah. You have completed Umrah. Ask Allah to accept it and keep your heart connected to Him.

title: Optional Recommended Deeds
subtitle: Use your time in worship
explanation: Pray extra voluntary prayers, read Qur'an, make dhikr, give charity, and show kindness to others.
audioScript: Use your time in the holy places wisely. Small sincere deeds are beloved to Allah.

title: Make Final Dua and Depart
subtitle: Leave with gratitude
explanation: Before leaving Makkah, make heartfelt dua, thank Allah, and depart with good manners.
audioScript: Before leaving, make final dua with a sincere heart. Ask Allah to accept your Umrah and invite you again.

title: Visit Madinah and Reflect
subtitle: Continue the journey with love and consistency
explanation: If possible, visit Masjid an-Nabawi in Madinah. Continue good deeds after returning home.
audioScript: Your journey continues after Umrah. Keep your heart connected to Allah and carry the lessons into your daily life.
